title: hieracium sabaudum subsp. rigidum
intro: Hieracium sabaudum subsp. rigidum, also known as the rigid hawk's-beard, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its high content of inulin, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium sabaudum subsp. rigidum include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
